items.title: Karnataka politics LIVE: Siddaramaiah to step down as CM; decision relayed to Cabinet colleagues, confirm official sources
items.summary: His deputy and possible successor, D.K. Shivakumar and other cabinet colleagues attended the breakfast meeting where the decision was announced
